title: nycteranthus inaequalis
intro: Nycteranthus inaequalis, also known as the night-blooming cactus, is a species of flowering plant native to the Atacama Desert in Chile. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Nycteranthus inaequalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the flowers or stems in hot water, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, including skin irritations and minor infections.
